message:
bd-2luz1 bd-3oaig.10: mega snapshots + width/quake fixes

- ftui-demo-showcase: refresh Mermaid mega showcase snapshots; expand CLI help; add minimap tag
- file_browser: remove VS16 icons and assert stable grapheme width
- ftui-render: set_fast uses real unicode width; bench uses opaque bg cell
- ftui-extras/quake: Z-aware supportive floors, tick cap, centroid guard
- beads: close bd-3oaig.10; add mouse/shortcuts follow-ups

files.patch:
@@ -280,6 +280,7 @@ pub const SCREEN_REGISTRY: &[ScreenMeta] = &[
             "layout",
             "diagnostics",
             "controls",
+            "minimap",
         ],
         blurb: "Interactive Mermaid diagrams with layout diagnostics and live controls.",
         default_hotkey: None,
